title: Fishing +
description: These are fishing-themed mini-games that feature their own rank system, custom effects, a stats panel, and a shop.
body:
![Logo Fishing+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7486625ca9475f10e2b848f10812b95b0fd942b.png)

# Fishing +

The Fishing + mini-game offers a wide range of features, from fishing itself to custom effects.

You need the [JakubSasinkaCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/jakubsasinkacore); otherwise, this minigame won't work, as most of the functions are in that library

## 💎 Key Features

- This minigame features its own ranking system, which is displayed in real time on the action bar along with caught fish, coins, and points. _(Gallery:[Fishing+ Ranks])_
- Players can also use a stick to open a statistics panel, where they can view what they have caught and their total number of fish caught. _(Gallery:[Fishing+ Statistics])_
- It also includes its own shop, where players can currently purchase only Luck and Lure upgrades up to a maximum level of 10. _(Gallery:[Fishing+ Shop])_
- Last but not least, for visual design, the minigame has its own custom effects that appear above the player while they are in the Fishing area. _(Gallery:[Fishing+ Effects])_
- The minigame also features a random event where a "Pirate" spawns every 5 minutes; if a player happens to be in the fishing area at that moment, there’s a chance they’ll lose their coins and points. The only way to avoid this is to leave the fishing area in time. _(Gallery:[Fishing+ Pirate])_
- If you don’t have your own spawn/lobby system on the server, you can set the world name and coordinates in the Core plugin ‘Minigames.Lobby’. And using the oak door in the hotbar will teleport you there.
- Additionally, the hotbar generates oak doors that allow you to access the lobby/spawn based on the coordinates and world specified in config.yml

### 👤 Player Commands

- ```/fishing Debug [time]``` Debug mode /fishing Debug [time], where `time` is in seconds. This allows you to calculate statistics on the number of fish caught, points earned, and coins collected over a specific time period of your choice, and then display the results in the chat. _(Gallery:[Fishing+ Debug])_
- ```/fishing leave``` Teleports the player to the lobby/spawn based on the coordinates and world specified in the config.

## 🔖 Language System

  Currently, only the cs_CZ.yml and en_US.yml files are available. However, if you want to change the language, simply set `settings.Language` to your preferred language in the config.yml file. If you are using multiple plugins, they share a single centralized language system in the Core plugin. Therefore, language files are not included in individual plugins.

## ⚙️ Configuration

- The coordinates for the mini-games are set in the configuration file in Core. To apply the changes, you need to run '/jsc reload <command>' in the "config.yml" file.

   <details>
      <summary>Click to view config.yml</summary>
      
      # *   Config version 1.0.0
      # *   Minecraft versions:
      # *     Build: 1.21.11
      # *     Tested: 26.1.2, 1.21.11
      
      # ?     Fishing +
      
      settings:
        name: "X"
        version: "1.0.0"
        supported: "26.1.2"
        created: "26.1.2"
        build: "B100"
        alpha: "A1000"

   </details>

## 🔑 Permissions

  Compatible with - [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/plugin/luckperms), _compatibility with other permission management plugins is not guaranteed._
    
    fishing+.admin – Access to all commands (default: OP, jakubsasinkacore.admin)
    fishing+.user – Access to user common commands

## 📌 PAPI Placeholders

   If you want to use these placeholders, you need to have the [PlaceholderAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi) installed on your server.
   <details>
      <summary>Click to view all Placeholders</summary>
     
      %JSC%  // Returns the text "Registered"; otherwise, there is an error somewhere.
      %JSC_time%  // Last updated
      %JSC_Fishing_me%
      %JSC_Fishing_me_Points_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_me_Coins_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_me_CaughtFish_score%

      %JSC_Fishing_me_RankZ_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<number 1-10>_name%
      %JSC_Fishing_<number 1-10>_Points_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<number 1-10>_Coins_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<number 1-10>_CaughtFish_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<number 1-10>_Lure_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<number 1-10>_Luck_score%

      %JSC_Fishing_<number 1-10>_RankZ_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<Player Name>%
      %JSC_Fishing_<Player Name>_Points_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<Player Name>_Coins_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<Player Name>_CaughtFish_score%
      %JSC_Fishing_<Player Name>_Lure_score%

## 🔧 Compatibility

    Version: Minecraft 26.1.x, 1.21.11-1.21.1
    Major Version: Minecraft 1.21.11
    Server: Paper, Spigot, Purpur, Bukkit
